name: IndusInd Indulge Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 6X Reward Points on dining spends at restaurants
4X Reward Points on entertainment spends (movies, events, streaming)
1 Reward Point per ₹100 spent on all other purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: 2,500 bonus Reward Points on card activation

milestoneBenefits.benefit: 2,000 bonus Reward Points + Dineout Passport renewal

additionalBenefits: Complimentary Dineout Passport with up to 25% off at 2,000+ restaurants
6X rewards on dining makes it one of the best dining cards
4X rewards on entertainment for movie and event enthusiasts
Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹250 per month
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
pros: Excellent 6X rewards on dining is among the best for food lovers
4X rewards on entertainment covers movies, events, and streaming
Complimentary Dineout Passport membership for restaurant discounts
Foreign currency markup of 3% is slightly better than mid-tier peers
Annual fee waiver at ₹3L spend is reasonable
cons: Base earn rate of 1 RP/₹100 is low for non-dining/entertainment spends
Limited utility for users who don't spend heavily on dining and entertainment
Point value of ₹0.50 reduces the effective return
idealFor: Food enthusiasts and frequent diners who can maximize 6X dining rewards
Entertainment spenders who regularly spend on movies, events, and streaming
Lifestyle-oriented users who want a card tailored to dining and entertainment

faqs.question: What is the Dineout Passport and how does it work?
faqs.answer: Dineout Passport is a premium dining membership offering up to 25% off at 2,000+ restaurants across India. As an Indulge cardholder, you receive this membership complimentary on paying the joining fee.

faqs.question: What counts as entertainment spend for 4X rewards?
faqs.answer: Entertainment spends include movie tickets (BookMyShow, PVR, etc.), event bookings, OTT streaming subscriptions, and amusement park tickets. The merchant category code (MCC) determines eligibility.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,499 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: How does the Indulge card compare to the EazyDiner card for dining?
faqs.answer: The Indulge card offers 6X on all dining, while the EazyDiner card offers 10X specifically on EazyDiner bookings and 3X on other dining. If you use EazyDiner frequently, the EazyDiner card may be better. For general dining across all restaurants, the Indulge card is more versatile.
